title: guettarda angelica
intro: Guettarda angelica is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, also known as Angel's Trumpet or Angel's Tears, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Guettarda angelica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to ease respiratory problems. Guettarda angelica can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
